title: SSP06 hyperdrive generator
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''SSP06 hyperdrive generator''' was manufactured by [[Isu-Sim/Legends|Isu-Sim]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]] had 123 of the units for propulsion in [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], all of which were connected to a single navigational matrix, in order to ensure the Death Star was carried beyond the speed of light due to its massive size. The [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] system was linked with the navicomputer to deliver the battle station to strategic areas beyond the hazardous range of planetary or stellar gravitational forces.

==Sources==
